New — Relay 2.0 with Focus Threads

Where fast teams
stay in sync.
Relay folds updates, decisions, and blockers into one calm daily digest — so your team ships instead of syncing about shipping.
Start free — no card
Book a demo
Trusted by product teams at
Northwind
Acme Corp
Globex
Initech
Umbrella
Stark Labs

Why Relay

Less syncing.
More shipping.
Six ways Relay gives your team its week back.

One calm digest
Every update, decision, and blocker lands in a single daily thread — not thirty channels.

Async by default
Record a decision once. Relay routes it to the people it affects, in their timezone.

Notifications batch around your focus blocks. Nothing pings at dinner.

Live goal tracking pulls from your tools, so Monday's status meeting is just... gone.

Plays well with others
GitHub, Linear, Figma, and Slack stay the source of truth — Relay is the summary on top.

Focus Threads

Decisions that
document themselves.
Every thread ends with a decision card — who decided, what changed, and what happens next. Six months later, the answer to "why did we do this?" is one search away.
